message:
feat: add gt maintain command for one-command Dolt maintenance (gt-8ubf)

Encapsulates the manual reap+flatten+gc procedure into a single command
with 8 phases: park rigs, backup, reap closed wisps, flatten databases
over commit threshold, stop server, gc, restart server, unpark rigs.

Supports --force (non-interactive), --dry-run (preview), and
--threshold (configurable commit threshold for flatten, default 100).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
